resources.string: Password must be at least %d characters
Too many attempts. Try again in %d seconds.
Not enough data. Record health data first.
Migration successful! Database is now encrypted.
Migration failed: %s. Your data has been restored to its original state.
Adaptively predicted based on the last %1$d cycles (average %2$s days/cycle, %3$s days/period)
Are you sure you want to delete the record for this date? This action cannot be undone.
Export database as a ZIP backup file
Restore data from a backup file
Export records as a CSV spreadsheet
Too many attempts. Please wait %d seconds.
Start recording your period to see analysis and predictions here
Encrypted backup and restore of all data
A comprehensive health tracking app with privacy at its core.
Select your preferred language. The app will restart to apply the change.
No weight records yet. Add your first weight entry.
Deleted records are kept for 30 days before permanent removal.
All deleted records will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
Get notified before your period starts
Not enough data to display chart
Period analysis is not applicable for male users. Showing general health data below.
Record more health data for personalized insights
Please select your gender for personalized health tracking
Shows all features including period tracking
You can change this later in Settings
Change your gender to adjust feature modules

1. Service Declaration

TianshangHealth is a comprehensive health tracking application that prioritizes user privacy and data security. All data is stored locally on your device with strong encryption.

2. Data Privacy

We do not collect, upload, or share any of your personal health data. The application operates completely offline with zero network permissions.

3. User Responsibility

You are responsible for the accuracy of the health data you enter. The predictions and analyses provided are for reference only and do not constitute medical advice.

4. Data Security

Your data is protected with SQLCipher AES-256 encryption. The encryption key is managed through Android Keystore for hardware-level security.

1. Core Principle: Data Localization

All your health data, including menstrual cycles, symptoms, and other health metrics, is stored only in the encrypted database on your device.

2. Information Collected

We only process information that you manually enter into the application. No automatic data collection occurs.

3. Data Encryption

All sensitive data is encrypted using SQLCipher with AES-256 encryption. The encryption key is securely stored in Android Keystore.

4. No Third-Party Access

We do not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services. Your data never leaves your device.

5. Data Export

You can export your data at any time in standard formats (CSV, encrypted backup). You have full control over your data.

6. Data Deletion

You can delete any or all of your data at any time. Deleted data is permanently removed from the device.
Don\'t forget to log your period data today!
Your fertile window is coming up soon!
PMS symptoms may start in a few days. Take care!
Enter a password to encrypt your backup file.
Enter the password used to encrypt this backup file.
Your step count remains consistent across cycle phases, good exercise habit maintained.
Average mood score is lower in luteal phase, consider mood management
Average mood score is higher in luteal phase, you\'re doing great
Sleep Quality Drops in Luteal Phase
Sleep quality decreases during luteal phase, try relaxation exercises
Sleep quality is higher in luteal phase, keep up the good routine
Stress levels are %s points higher during period, consider reducing intense activities
Your mood score is low today, try doing something you enjoy
Stress levels are high today, try deep breathing or meditation
Sleep quality was low last night, try going to bed early tonight
Activity drops significantly in luteal phase
Rest appropriately during luteal phase, light exercise like yoga recommended
Great activity increase, remember to maintain nutrition
Luteal phase steps decreased by %d%% compared to follicular phase. Light activity like walking is recommended.
Luteal phase steps increased by %d%% compared to follicular phase. Remember to rest and maintain nutrition.
Step counts remain stable across cycle phases. Good exercise habits maintained.
Average mood score is %s points lower in luteal phase. Consider mood management.
Average mood score is %s points higher in luteal phase. You are doing great!
Sleep Quality Drops in Luteal Phase
Sleep quality decreased by %s points in luteal phase. Try relaxation exercises before bed.
Sleep quality is %s points higher in luteal phase. Keep up the good routine.
Backups are encrypted with AES-256-GCM using your password.
No workouts recorded yet.\nTap + to add your first workout.
Battery optimization may stop the step counting service and affect step tracking.
TianshangHealth needs access to activity recognition to count your steps in the background.
Permission denied. Step counting will not work.
No meals recorded yet.\nTap + to add your first meal.
Lower Calorie Intake in Luteal Phase
Calories decreased by %.0f kcal in luteal phase. Try to maintain a balanced diet.
Higher Calorie Intake in Luteal Phase
Calories increased by %.0f kcal in luteal phase. This is normal, listen to your body.
Your calorie intake remains stable across cycle phases. Great job!
Verify your identity to reset app lock
Low sleep, high stress, and low mood suggest burnout risk. Consider rest days.
High exercise volume with calorie deficit and low sleep. Watch for injury.
Very low step count paired with low mood. A short walk may help.
Low water intake and high stress levels. Hydration supports resilience.
Good sleep, high activity, and positive mood reinforcing each other. Keep going!
Generate a comprehensive health report based on your recorded data. The report is created locally on your device and can be shared as a PDF.
Includes: Period records, steps, sleep, nutrition, and health insights
All reports are generated locally on your device. No health data is uploaded to any server or cloud service. Your data remains under your complete control.
Daily intake %.0f kcal is below recommended 1800 kcal. Consider adding complex carbs and healthy fats.
Daily intake %.0f kcal exceeds 2500 kcal. Consider reducing snacks and increasing vegetables.
Daily protein %.0f g is below recommended 50 g. Consider eggs, fish, and tofu.
Daily water %.0f ml is below recommendation. Aim for 1500-2000 ml daily.
Daily surplus %.0f kcal. If weight loss is your goal, consider increasing exercise.
Daily deficit %.0f kcal. Ensure you meet your basal metabolic needs.
Intake and expenditure are well balanced. Keep it up!
Weekly exercise %d minutes is below WHO recommendation of 150 minutes.
Weekly exercise %d minutes meets WHO recommendation!
Try different exercise types (cardio + strength + flexibility) for overall fitness.
Daily sleep %.1f hours is below recommended 7-9 hours. Try a regular schedule.
Daily sleep %.1f hours exceeds 9 hours. Long sleep may indicate fatigue.
Deep sleep ratio only %.0f%%. Avoid caffeine before bed and keep room dark.
Sleep quality score %.1f/5. Try meditation or warm bath before bed.
Luteal phase sleep decreased %.1f hours vs follicular. Normal hormonal change.
Focus on iron-rich foods to replenish blood loss. Magnesium helps reduce cramps. Stay well hydrated.
Leafy Greens · Red Meat · Fatty Fish · Dark Chocolate · Nuts
Your energy metabolism is rising. Great time for light, nutrient-dense meals. Support gut health with probiotics.
Berries · Citrus Fruits · Yogurt · Oats · Broccoli
Estrogen peaks during this phase. Support liver detoxification with antioxidant-rich foods. Anti-inflammatory diet recommended.
Antioxidants · Vitamin C · Zinc · Vitamin E
Bell Peppers · Sunflower Seeds · Lean Poultry · Avocado · Green Tea
Progesterone rises, which may increase appetite. Complex carbs help boost serotonin. Limit caffeine and salt to ease PMS symptoms.
B Vitamins · Complex Carbs · Magnesium · Calcium · Vitamin B6
Whole Grains · Bananas · Leafy Greens · Legumes · Dark Chocolate
No period records in selected period.
This report is generated locally on your device. No data leaves your phone.
Settings → Battery → Power Saving → Select App → Set to "No Restrictions"
Settings → Apps → Permissions → Auto-start → Enable this app\nOr: Security Center → Permissions → Auto-start → Enable
Open recent apps → Swipe down app card → Tap lock icon
Settings → Battery → Launch → Disable "Auto-manage" → Manually enable "Auto-launch", "Secondary launch", "Run in background"
Settings → Apps → App Launch → Disable "Auto-manage" → Enable all
Open recent apps → Swipe down app → Tap lock icon
Settings → Battery → Launch → Disable "Auto-manage" → Enable all
Settings → Apps → App Launch → Disable "Auto-manage" → Enable all
Open recent apps → Swipe down app → Tap lock icon
Settings → Battery → App Battery Management → Select App → Enable "Allow Background Activity"
Settings → App Management → Select App → Enable "Auto-start"
Open recent apps → Swipe down app → Tap lock icon
Settings → Battery → Background Power Consumption → Select App → Enable "Allow Background Running"
Settings → More Settings → Apps → Auto-start → Enable this app
Open recent apps → Tap menu in top-right corner of app → Select "Lock"
Settings → Battery → Background Usage Limits → Add this app to "Never Sleeping Apps" list
Settings → Apps → Select App → Battery → Select "Unrestricted"
Open recent apps → Long press app icon → Tap lock icon
Settings → Battery → Battery Optimization → Select "All Apps" → Search this app → Set to "Don't Optimize"
Settings → App Management → Select App → Enable "Auto-start"
Open recent apps → Long press app window → Tap lock icon in top-right corner
Settings → Battery → Power Saving Settings → App Battery Management → Enable "Allow Background Activity"
Settings → App Management → Select App → Enable "Auto-start"
Open recent apps → Swipe down app → Tap lock icon
Settings → Apps → Select App → Battery → Select "Unrestricted"
Focus on rest and recovery. Light stretching and foam rolling can help relieve tension.
Your energy is rising! This is the best phase for challenging workouts and new PRs.
You are at peak physical performance! Take advantage but do not forget to warm up properly.
Energy declines as progesterone rises. Prioritize sleep, hydration, and stress relief.
Insufficient cycles for prediction (need at least %1$d).
TFLite %1$s predicted next period in %2$d days (based on %3$d-day average cycle, confidence %4$d%%).
Fallback: predicted based on %1$d-day average cycle (from %2$s).
Fallback: predicted based on %1$d-day average cycle (simple average).
Customize your app background with presets, gradients, or your own images
